review_status: Draft v0 — pending securities-counsel confirmation. Defaults are best-effort, not legal advice.

operating_entity.name: Tiny Assets (operating entity TBD pending Wyoming DAO LLC formation)
operating_entity.type: Pre-formation; treat as unincorporated association at v0
operating_entity.jurisdiction: Delaware (default — counsel may relocate to Wyoming for DAO LLC)

jurisdiction.governing_law: State of Delaware, USA (without regard to conflict-of-laws)
jurisdiction.dispute_resolution: JAMS binding arbitration in Delaware, individual claims only (class-action waiver), small-claims-court carve-out preserved
jurisdiction.liability_cap: Lesser of (a) fees paid to us in the 12 months preceding the claim, or (b) USD 100
jurisdiction.venue_for_injunctive: State and federal courts located in Delaware

token.name: Tiny Assets (ta)
token.intended_classification: Digital tool / digital commodity (per SEC 2026 Project Crypto)
token.rewards_model: Activity-based — daemons earn ta for completed work that clears outcome gates. No passive yield.

geo_restrictions.status: Default block list — counsel may amend
blocked_jurisdictions: OFAC-comprehensively-sanctioned countries (Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Russia/Crimea, Syria, and other comprehensive-sanctions jurisdictions per 31 CFR 500-599)
People's Republic of China (PRC crypto-trading ban)
Any jurisdiction where holding or transacting in utility tokens is prohibited by local law
geo_restrictions.enforcement_layer: Wallet-connect screening (Chainalysis or TRM at MCP gateway). Self-declared geo-attestation at first paid-market action.

kyc_aml.tier1_chatbot_user: No KYC — browse, run free-tier daemons, place free workflow runs.
kyc_aml.tier2_daemon_host: KYC required at lifetime cumulative paid-market threshold of USD 1,000 (Sumsub or Persona).
kyc_aml.treasury_operations: Full KYC + accredited-investor verification where applicable.
kyc_aml.ofac_screening: Chainalysis Sanctions API at wallet-connect, real-time, plus daily batch refresh of registered wallets.

dao.current_status: Informal — votes are advisory only, non-binding pending legal-entity formation.
dao.target_structure: Wyoming DAO LLC (Wyo. Stat. § 17-31-101 et seq.) before Phase 8 launch.
dao.voter_liability: Limited to ta staked in vote per smart-contract rules; no personal liability claim recognized.
vote_scope: Which goals are canonical in the public catalog
Which third-party verifiers count for outcome-gate clearance
Which outcome-gate ladders qualify for ta minting

force_majeure: Blockchain-network events (chain reorgs, RPC outages, gas spikes >5x baseline, hard forks)
Cyberattacks affecting the gateway, MCP, or daemon hosts
Regulatory action that prohibits continued operation
Acts of God, war, civil unrest, pandemics

tax_reporting.us_threshold: Daemon hosts who earn ≥USD 600/year in ta will receive year-end CSV for self-reporting; we do not file 1099-MISC at v0.
tax_reporting.international: Users responsible for own tax treatment in their jurisdiction.
